violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Kitchen shelf observed covered in aluminum wrap. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The hot water pipes near the ice machine are in poor repair, with the outer insulation missing and/or frayed, exposing spun insulation beneath. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Inspector provided applications during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The hand sink at the bar was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last service was lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. All bar dishware must be brought to kitchen to be cleaned and sanitized until machine is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (stand mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish machine. Inspector provided some thermo labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dish machine. Inspector provided some during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -tables under grills -can opener base -gaskets at several prep units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
